businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Fluids (z.B. 1000 kg/m³ für Wasser)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du fluide (ex. 1000 kg/m³ pour l'eau)
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del fluido (ej. 1000 kg/m³ para agua)

inputs.label: Yerçekimi İvmesi (g)
inputs.businessContext: Standard gravitational acceleration; taken as 9.81 m/s²

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard gravitational acceleration; taken as 9.81 m/s²
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración gravitacional estándar; se toma 9.81 m/s²

inputs.label: 1 Noktası Basıncı (P₁)
inputs.businessContext: Absolute pressure at the inlet (e.g., atmospheric pressure 101325 Pa)

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute pressure at the inlet (e.g., atmospheric pressure 101325 Pa)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş noktasındaki mutlak basınç (örneğin atmosfer basıncı 101325 Pa)
businessContext_i18n.de: Absoluter Druck am Eintrittspunkt (z.B. Atmosphärendruck 101325 Pa)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression absolue au point d'entrée (ex. pression atmosphérique 101325 Pa)
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión absoluta en el punto de entrada (ej. presión atmosférica 101325 Pa)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط المطلق عند نقطة الدخول (مثل الضغط الجوي 101325 باسكال)

businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del flujo en el punto de entrada

inputs.label: 1 Noktası Yüksekliği (z₁)
inputs.businessContext: Height of the inlet relative to the reference level

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the inlet relative to the reference level
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş noktasının referans seviyeye göre yüksekliği
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Eintrittspunkts relativ zum Referenzniveau
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur du point d'entrée par rapport au niveau de référence
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura del punto de entrada respecto al nivel de referencia
businessContext_i18n.ar: ارتفاع نقطة الدخول بالنسبة للمستوى المرجعي

businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression absolue au point de sortie
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión absoluta en el punto de salida

inputs.label: 2 Noktası Yüksekliği (z₂)
inputs.businessContext: Height of the outlet relative to the reference level

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the outlet relative to the reference level
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkış noktasının referans seviyeye göre yüksekliği
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Austrittspunkts relativ zum Referenzniveau
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur du point de sortie par rapport au niveau de référence
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura del punto de salida respecto al nivel de referencia
businessContext_i18n.ar: ارتفاع نقطة الخروج بالنسبة للمستوى المرجعي

inputs.label: Yük Kaybı (hₗ)
inputs.businessContext: Total head loss between the two points (friction, etc.); if 0 is entered, it is considered lossless

businessContext_i18n.en: Total head loss between two points (friction, etc.); if 0, assumed lossless
businessContext_i18n.tr: İki nokta arasındaki toplam yük kaybı (sürtünme vb.), 0 girilirse kayıpsız kabul edilir
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtdruckverlust zwischen zwei Punkten (Reibung usw.); bei Eingabe 0 wird verlustfrei angenommen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de charge totale entre les deux points (frottement, etc.) ; 0 si sans perte
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdida de carga total entre los dos puntos (fricción, etc.); si se ingresa 0, se considera sin pérdidas
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي فقدان الشحنة بين النقطتين (الاحتكاك إلخ)، إذا أُدخل 0 يُعتبر بدون فقدان

formulas.result: density * g * P1 * v1 * (z1 * P2 * z2 * head_loss)

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
